content: indeed! Tenatively planning on Night Shift Esplanade. If we manage to snag a proper venue before then I would love to do a larger event with talks and food
Here's the link to the event. I'll add some details today https://atmo.rsvp/p/atproto.boston/e/3mm55mfacxkjm
Oh, right, right, Night Shift! We've talked about it here: #boston > Night Shift Esplanade

https://bsky.app/profile/did:plc:pqerwmnouevyltxyoayhholf/post/3mnbgzcskfs2p

ATproto Boston's June meetup is next Thursday! Would love to see y'all there. Our meetups are a casual hang out at local breweries to talk about the open social web, civic technology, and the future of the internet. All are welcome!
and yes, this is an events app similar to Luma but on atproto. sign in with your bluesky account to rsvp!

ATProto Boston meetup tonight! We’ll be at Night Shift Esplanade at 7!

https://mu.social/profile/atproto.boston/post/3mnzhee2n222d
Nice. How late will you be there?

Philip Durbin said in #boston > 2026-06 meetup:

I just updated the website to say we're meeting on June 21st. At Time Out. At 7pm. See you there! https://bostonopen.dev

happy to help cross promote this in the atmosphere! best way would be to set up the group account with the @bostonopen.dev handle and post it as an event on atmo.rsvp. that will circulate it to all the atmosphere event sites and things like calendar.city/boston
Huh, interesting. Thanks. I think the first step would be to get on ATproto. :smile:

https://bsky.app/profile/atproto.boston/post/3mq5cnhnlxc2s
Hey folks! ATProto Boston is having their July meetup tomorrow at the common. Would love to see y’all there!
By the Lafayette Mall Monument. Ok. Thanks for the invite! How long will you be there? I'll be having dinner with the family first, if I go.
hah I forgot to check back here. we were there til closing time at 9!

Hey friends! ATProto Boston is having an event in a couple weeks. There will be pizza and talks and demos, plus all sorts of great folk working on the open social web and digital agency. I hope to see you there!

https://bsky.app/profile/did:plc:pqerwmnouevyltxyoayhholf/post/3mqpucmcoqs26
